name: Daughter TG
description:
In an attempt to suck up to her boss George, your wife Jen pretended to be a single parent, like him. Now that George is coming over for dinner with his 18-years old son Cole, Jen transforms you into an 18-years old girl so that you can pretend to be her daughter and her lie doesn't get exposed.

Can you survive an evening as a teenage girl when your wife is trying her damn best to get a promotion, her boss wants to seduce her, and his son is flirting with you? You are no only one not versed in magic and all the others are more then willing to cast a few spells to further their goals.

EDIT: Replaced the picture with an anime-style one by popular demand.
creator: Kéko
